rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 31, 2008, line 8. DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF GARY AND PROUTY, C LETTS AND DANA MITCHELL'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar. Case has been assigned to Judge Tang. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HILL et al VS. DAMERON HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 31, 2008, line 9. DEFENDANT DAMERON HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action. Plaintiffs are not stakeholders and Dameron is not seeking to recover the funds at issue. The demurrer is overruled as to the remaining causes of action. There is an actual controversy between the parties because the unresolved lien of Dameron imparts plaintiffs' right to settlement proceeds. The decision in Action Apartments Ass'n v. City of Santa Monica (2007) 41 Cal. 4th 1231, 1251 holds that the application of the litigation privilege is a question of fact where, as here, Dameron was not a party to the litigation. The fact that the lien had to be filed before Dameron could assert its rights still requires a factual inquiry. See Birkner v. Lam (2007) 156 Cal. App. 4th 275, 286. As a consequence, the demurrer is overruled as the third and fourth causes of action. The Raucho decision is not binding on the Court. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HILL et al VS. DAMERON HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 31, 2008, line 9. DEFENDANT DAMERON HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied as to punitive damages. It is granted as to attorneys fees with leave to amend if there is a basis for recovery under CCP section 1021.5. =(302/PJM/PB)
